violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. PIC notified. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the sandwich prep refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Water observed in stacked food containers on clean storage rack and in a clean container storing utensils. Utensils were rewashed and sanitized. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment must be air dried. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The fan covers in walk in coolers have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

The floors beneath shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of dust, soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

Leaf litter and debris buildup were observed around the back outside staircase. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The coving in the women's toilet area is in poor repair (pulling away from wall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Cut melon (prepared this morning) was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved all product to blast chiller. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

ROP fish observed thawing under water while packaging was intact. Fish was removed from packaging and placed in the walk in cooler to thaw. Fish above 38 degrees was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the produce area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
The dumpster and its area were observed to have trash and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
